text_original: good story lines, memory can sometimes be flaky but not to bad
text_zh: 剧情不错，记忆有时可能不太可靠，但也不算太差
reply_original: Thank you for your feedback! We're glad you enjoy the storylines. Regarding the memory issues, we've noted your concern and are actively optimizing the AI's recall system. For specific details, please share a screenshot or describe the issue via support@fantachat.ai. Your input helps us improve!
reply_zh: 感谢您的反馈！很高兴您喜欢这些故事线。关于记忆问题，我们已注意到您的担忧，并正在积极优化AI的回忆系统。如需具体信息，请通过support@fantachat.ai发送截图或描述问题。您的反馈帮助我们不断改进！
